client_id.description: The unique identifier for a single Contact. The keyword `null` is not valid for this field. The list will be filtered to include only the Matter records with the matching property.

email_only.description: Filter Contact records to those that have email addresses.

ids.description: Filter Contact records to those having the specified unique identifiers.

initial.description: Filter Contact records to those where the last name or company name start with the given initial.

query.description:
Wildcard search for name, title, email address, address, phone number, web site, instant messenger address,
custom fields, related matter name, or company name matching a given string.

shared_resource_id.description: Filter Contact records to those that currently have access to a given shared resource.

assignee_type.name: assignee_type
assignee_type.description: Filter Task records to those with a specific assignee. Must be passed if filtering by assignee.

assigner_id.name: assigner_id
assigner_id.description: The unique identifier for a single User. Use the keyword `null` to match those without a Task. The list will be filtered to include only the Task records with the matching property.

cascading_source_id.name: cascading_source_id
cascading_source_id.description: Filter Task records to those with a parent task that has the specified ID.

client_id.description: The unique identifier for a single Contact. Use the keyword `null` to match those without a Task. The list will be filtered to include only the Task records with the matching property.

complete.name: complete
complete.description: Filter Task records to those which are complete or not.

created_since.name: created_since
created_since.description: Filter Task records to those having the `created_at` field after a specific time. (Expects an ISO-8601 timestamp).

due_at_from.name: due_at_from
due_at_from.description: Start of date range when querying by due_at in a range. (Expects an ISO-8601 date).

due_at_present.name: due_at_present
due_at_present.description: Filter Task records to those that have a due date specified, or not.

due_at_to.name: due_at_to
due_at_to.description: End of date range when querying by due_at in a range. (Expects an ISO-8601 date).

ids.name: ids[]
ids.description: Filter Task records to those having the specified unique identifiers.

matter_id.name: matter_id
matter_id.description: The unique identifier for a single Matter. Use the keyword `null` to match those without a Task. The list will be filtered to include only the Task records with the matching property.

permission.name: permission
permission.description: Filter Task records to those with the given permission. Returns all tasks by default.

priority.name: priority
priority.description: Filter Task records to those with the given priority.

query.name: query
query.description: Wildcard search for `name` or `description` matching a given string.

responsible_attorney_id.name: responsible_attorney_id
responsible_attorney_id.description: Filter Task records to those that have an associated matter with a responsible attorney ID.

status.name: status
status.description: Filter Task records to those with the given status. Users without advanced tasks enabled may only specify 'complete' or 'pending'.

statuses.name: statuses[]
statuses.description: Filter Task records to those with the given statuses. Users without advanced tasks enabled may only specify 'complete' or 'pending'.

statute_of_limitations.name: statute_of_limitations
statute_of_limitations.description: Filter Task records to those which are a statute of limitations or not.

task_type_id.name: task_type_id

updated_since.description: Filter Task records to those having the `updated_at` field after a specific time. (Expects an ISO-8601 timestamp).

calendar_id.name: calendar_id
calendar_id.description: The unique identifier for a single Calendar. The keyword `null` is not valid for this field. The list will be filtered to include only the CalendarEntry records with the matching property.

created_since.name: created_since
created_since.description: Filter CalendarEntry records to those having the `created_at` field after a specific time. (Expects an ISO-8601 timestamp).

expanded.name: expanded
expanded.description: Returns a record for each occurrence of a recurring calendar event.  Non-recurring calendar events are unaffected and returned as separate records regardless of the expanded setting.

external_property_name.name: external_property_name
external_property_name.description:
Filter records to only those with the given external property(s) name set.

e.g. `?external_property_name=Name`

external_property_value.name: external_property_value
external_property_value.description:
Filter records to only those with the given external property(s) value set. Requires external property name as well.

e.g. `?external_property_name=Name&external_property_value=Value`

from.name: from
from.description: Filter CalendarEntry records to those that end on or after the provided time (Expects an ISO-8601 timestamp).

has_court_rule.name: has_court_rule
has_court_rule.description: Allows matching court rule on calendar entry.
